name: How do you optimize content for AI visibility without rewriting the whole site?

mainEntity.name: How do you optimize content for AI visibility without rewriting the whole site?

acceptedAnswer.text: A practical workflow is to research the exact questions people ask, group them by intent, then write pages that answer those questions directly. After that, add schema, improve internal linking, and refresh the content regularly so it stays current.
acceptedAnswer.description: Target the highest-value questions first, then add schema and internal links to existing pages.

description: Target the highest-value questions first, then add schema and internal links to existing pages.
